title: GoldenMaus's connected textures
description: A simple resource pack to enhance your world
body:
# ✨ GoldenMaus's Connected textures

Give your worlds a smoother, cleaner, more natural look!
This resource pack adds Connected Textures (CTM) to a wide variety of commonly used blocks, improving building aesthetics and reducing harsh tile edges. Perfect for builders, decorators, and players who want a more polished visual experience.

**_Minecraft may show a warning that this pack was made for a newer version, but this is normal and the pack still works correctly across all supported versions._**

### 🔧 Features

Seamless transitions between blocks
- Softened edges and blended patterns
- Matching variations designed to reduce visible grid lines
- Works great with shaders and vanilla 

## 🧱 Supported Blocks
### 🌳 Logs & Wood

- Acacia Log, Acacia Planks
- Birch Log, Birch Planks
- Cherry Log, Cherry Planks
- Dark Oak Log, Dark Oak Planks
- Jungle Log, Jungle Planks
- Mangrove Log, Mangrove Planks
- Oak Log, Oak Planks
- Spruce Log, Spruce Planks
- Stripped variants for:
- Acacia
- Birch
- Cherry
- Dark Oak
- Jungle
- Mangrove
- Oak
- Spruce

### 🪵 Nether Woods

- Crimson Planks
- Warped Planks

### 🏛 Stone & Structural

- Chiseled Sandstone
- Cut Sandstone, Cut Sandstone Wall
- Cut Red Sandstone Wall
- Deepslate Bricks
- Cracked Deepslate Bricks
- Polished Blackstone Bricks
- Cracked Polished Blackstone Bricks
- Quartz Bricks
- Quartz Pillar
- Purpur Pillar
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Netherrack
- Mud
- Mushroom Stem

## 📦 Requirements

A CTM-compatible mod such as Continuity or OptiFine
